output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Get It Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legally backed demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no signup needed.
content_outline: The Silent Heist: Why Landlords Bank on You Giving Up
Know Your Rights: What a Landlord Can (and Cannot) Deduct
From Frustrated to Paid: How a Demand Letter Changes the Game
No Lawyer, No Waitlist: The 60-Second Tool to Reclaim Your Deposit
key_points: Most landlords withhold deposits illegally, hoping tenants won't have the time or money to fight back
State laws strictly limit deductions to actual damage beyond normal wear and tear; cleaning fees and vague charges often violate tenant rights
A formal demand letter is the fastest, most effective way to signal you know your rights and are prepared to escalate
Deposits-Back.com generates a professional security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for a flat $19.99 with zero sign-ups or subscriptions
output.cta: Stop letting your landlord keep what's yours. Visit Deposits-Back.com, answer a few quick questions, and send a professional security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds. Just $19.99. No sign-up. No subscription. Get your money back now.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are wrongfully withholding, over-deducting from, or refusing to return security deposits, and who need a fast, affordable legal tool to recover their money without hiring an attorney.
